mapper.update: UPDATE biz_msg_thread SET user_a_unread = CASE WHEN user_a_id = #{userId} THEN user_a_unread + #{delta} ELSE user_a_unread END, user_b_unread = CASE WHEN user_b_id = #{userId} THEN user_b_unread + #{delta} ELSE user_b_unread END WHERE id = #{threadId}

UPDATE biz_msg_thread SET user_a_unread = CASE WHEN user_a_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE user_a_unread END, user_b_unread = CASE WHEN user_b_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE user_b_unread END WHERE id = #{threadId}
